info.title: AppStoreCat API
info.description: Open source app intelligence toolkit API. Provides endpoints for app registration, DNA building, store listing tracking, and analytics.

get.summary: Get store listing for a specific country

post.summary: Trigger a sync job for this app

200.description: Sync queued or already in progress

get.summary: Get current sync status for this app
List chart rankings for an app on a given date

post.summary: Add a competitor to an app

get.summary: List all competitor apps across all user apps

delete.summary: Remove a competitor from an app

get.summary: Get keyword density for an app
Compare keyword density with other apps

parameters.name: version_ids
parameters.description: Version ID per app (keyed by app ID)

get.summary: List store listing changes for all tracked apps
List store listing changes for all competitor apps
Get dashboard summary for current user
Browse app icons across all apps
Get publisher details with tracked apps
Fetch all apps by publisher from store

post.summary: Import and track apps from publisher

notes.example: Main competitor in the same category

unavailable_countries.description: Country codes where this app is not listed on the store.

country_code.description:
Expects $resource as array with keys:
 country_code, collection, category, rank, previous_rank, status, snapshot_date.

bearerAuth.description: Authentication using Bearer token. Example: Bearer {your-token}
